mapper.select: /** 시험지 게시판 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(a.TEST_TMPL_SEQ) FROM t_test_tmpl a where 1=1

/** 시험지에 저장된 문제 가져오기 */ select a.test_tmpl_seq ,b.tq_seq,b.marks ,c.qstn_nm,c.qstn_tp,c.diff_type,c.reg_de ,(select ctg_nm from t_qstn_category where qstn_ctg_seq = c.ctg1_seq) ctg1_nm ,(select ctg_nm from t_qstn_category where qstn_ctg_seq = c.ctg2_seq) ctg2_nm ,(select ctg_nm from t_qstn_category where qstn_ctg_seq = c.ctg3_seq) ctg3_nm ,(select user_nm from t_user_info where user_id = c.reg_id) reg_nm ,(select count(*) from t_question_choice where qstn_seq = c.qstn_seq) ch_cnt from t_test_tmpl a inner join t_test_question b on a.test_tmpl_seq = b.test_tmpl_seq inner join t_question c on b.qstn_seq = c.qstn_seq where a.test_tmpl_seq = #{testTmplSeq} order by b.tq_seq

/** 교육 > 시험지 정보 */ SELECT a.* ,b.test_tmpl_nm,b.ord_tp,choice_tp ,c.pass_yn,c.marks tot_marks_get,c.state test_result_state,c.start_de test_result_start_de ,c.end_de test_result_end_de ,c.check_de ,(select count(*) from t_test_question where test_tmpl_seq = b.test_tmpl_seq) qstn_cnt ,(select user_nm from t_user_info where user_id = a.reg_id) reg_nm ,(select user_nm from t_user_info where user_id = c.user_id) user_nm ,(select sum(marks) from t_test_question where test_tmpl_seq = b.test_tmpl_seq) tot_marks ,(select user_nm from t_user_info where user_id = c.check_id) check_nm FROM t_test a left join t_test_tmpl b on a.test_tmpl_seq = b.test_tmpl_seq left join (select * from t_test_result where user_id = #{userId} and test_seq = #{testSeq}) c on a.test_seq = c.test_seq where 1=1 and a.test_seq = #{testSeq}

/** 시험결과 학생 목록 */ select b.user_id,b.user_nm ,a.test_seq ,c.start_de,c.end_de,c.tot_marks,c.marks,c.pass_yn,c.achv_lvl,c.state test_result_state ,(select login_id from t_user_info where user_id = b.user_id) login_id from t_test a inner join t_lecture_stdnt b on a.edu_seq = b.edu_seq left join t_test_result c on a.test_seq = c.test_seq and b.user_id = c.user_id where a.edu_seq = #{eduSeq} and a.test_seq = #{testSeq} and b.state = 2 order by b.user_nm
select count(*) from t_test where test_tmpl_seq = #{testTmplSeq}
